title: iris lutescens subsp. olbiensis
intro: Iris lutescens subsp. olbiensis, also known as the Sardinian glaucous iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Iris lutescens subsp. olbiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an expectorant, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
